title.tags-mediaembed: Set a per-marketplace affiliate tag below. Product links to a configured marketplace are tagged with its value; leave a marketplace blank to skip it.

field.rich-card: Display Amazon product links as a rich product card
field.rich-card-help: When enabled, Amazon product URLs (/dp/ and /gp/product/) are shown as a compact card linking to the tagged product page. When disabled, they remain plain links and are tagged like any other Amazon link.
field.keep-existing-tag: Keep Amazon Affiliate Tags from original links instead of replacing
field.keep-existing-tag-help: By default any existing tag in the original url is replaced by the tag you define below.
field.help-mediaembed: Product cards always use your configured tag, so the "keep existing tags" setting only applies to plain links.
field.remove-tag-if-unhandled: Remove Amazon Affiliate Tags on Amazon links that aren't covered
field.remove-tag-if-unhandled-help: By default links that aren't covered are left as-it, including their tag if any.
field.tag-placeholder: Leave empty to not cover those links
